current.headline: Your Geothermal Installer Drilled 300 Feet Based on a Spreadsheet. AI Modeled Your Entire Subsurface.

round_1.notes: All 6 critics at 8.5+. Fixed 5 'The' sentence starters (13→8). Corrected Dandelion funding to ~$176M and investor attribution (GV led, BEV participated). Em dashes in prose: 1. No banned words. No paired antithesis. Passes gate → SHIP.
